entries.description: Retirement inventory complete: 11 extension surfaces + 7 live docs + 0 consumer-repo refs, file:line evidence in s1-audit.md sec 1; welcome-fallback unreachability proven (computeGettingStarted total, postSnapshot always ships gettingStarted); resurrection path = protocol optionality, closed by D2

budget.yaml contract audited: chat bootstrap was sole writer (pre-migration shape); migrator rewrites threshold_scope->scope + injects warn_at_percent; config editor BUDGET_SCHEMA requires threshold_usd, open schema; NO Python runtime reader (disposition.py docstrings only); scaffold never writes budget.yaml; locked post-migration writer shape in s1-audit.md sec 2.4

D1-D4 locked (s1-audit.md sec 4) after cross-provider consult: Q1/D3 converged retire-with-redirects + new docs/budget-yaml-schema.md; Q2/D1 $0 split resolved to required inline choice per workflow-doc operator-picks contract (gemini dissent recorded); Q3 writer shape confirmed; D4 Marketplace-only 0.32.0

Suites green, code untouched: Python 1222 passed/1 skipped; TS mocha 870 passing + 2 pre-existing Set-026 failures (configEditor-foundation, notificationsSection); Playwright Layer 3 LOCAL 18 passed (4.8m); drift_guard OK; dist/ compile artifacts restored

Cross-provider verification: R1 gpt-5-4 ISSUES_FOUND (1 Major Completeness: uncited mode/default semantics) -> citations added to s1-audit.md sec 2.4 + D3, s1-issues.json persisted -> R2 gpt-5-4 VERIFIED (narrow re-verify, no regression)

D1 shipped: pure-TS writer utils/budgetYaml.ts (post-migration sec-2.4 shape, mode bands, no-clobber, $0-requires-pick refusal); budget block rendered in gettingStartedHtml.js step 1 (Full-only visibility, $0 radio pair w/ locked copy, inline validation element); client.js wiring (gsState.budget/zeroMethod, build-structure blocked until valid, riders budgetUsd/zeroBudgetMethod); protocol riders + host narrowing asBudgetChoice; scaffoldConsumerRepo writes ai_router/budget.yaml at scaffold time Full-only w/ outcome reporting; summary message names written/kept outcome; tree.css gs-budget styles

D2 shipped per s1-audit sec-1.1 items 1-11: copyAdoptionBootstrapPrompt.ts deleted; extension.ts import+safeRegister removed; package.json command + viewsWelcome contribution removed, description reworded to name the Getting Started form; CustomSessionSetsView welcome pipe removed (welcomeHtml field/init/payload, loadWelcomeHtmlFromPackageJson, renderWelcomeMarkdown, escHtml/escAttr - compiler confirmed no surviving caller); SnapshotPayload.gettingStarted now REQUIRED + welcomeHtml field dropped (closes sec-1.4 resurrection path); client.js welcome fallback branch removed; tree.css .welcome removed; scanState.ts context-key publication removed (manager + webview scanState messages stay); stale comments touched up (extension.ts x3, scanState.ts, activationNoFolder.test.ts, loading-state.spec.ts x2, session-sets-tree.spec.ts, electronLaunch.ts); watcherInventory allowlist lines 192/228 -> 191/227 (import-removal shift)

Tests + suites green: budgetYaml.test.ts unit matrix (4 mode bands, \ w/ each method, narrowing, no-clobber, editor-schema acceptance via validateBatch, migrator-no-op TS twin, scaffold tier gate) + gettingStartedHtml budget rendering/validation suites + asBudgetChoice narrowing + rider-forward test; golden cold-start snapshot untouched (template bundle not modified) and passing. TS mocha 907 pass + 2 pre-existing Set-026 fails; Python 1222 pass/1 skip; Playwright Layer 3 LOCAL 18 passed (4.9m); drift_guard OK

Cross-provider verification: R1 gpt-5-4 ISSUES_FOUND (1 Major Correctness: Full build fails open on malformed budget rider; 1 Minor Completeness: Lightweight rendered budget input hidden not omitted) -> both fixed (router fail-closed rejection + budgetBlockHtml omission w/ tier-change local re-render), s2-issues.json persisted w/ resolutions, suites re-run green (TS 908+2 pre-existing) -> R2 gpt-5-4 VERIFIED (narrow re-verify, no regressions)
